The '''A-10 interceptor''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] in operation as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. It was the successor to the [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor|A-9 ''Vigilance'' interceptor]].

==History==
A-10 [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptors]] comprised part of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|force]] deployed against the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]] during the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
